summary: VPN disconnects every few minutes for remote user
resolution: Reset VPN client and re-added user to VPN group.

summary: VPN authentication timeout on Windows 11
resolution: Cleared cached credentials; issue resolved.

summary: VPN slow throughput from home office
resolution: Moved user to nearest gateway; disabled split-tunnel exclusion.

summary: Internal hostnames not resolving via DNS
resolution: Corrected resolver order and search suffix.

summary: Wi-Fi drops repeatedly in the 4th floor area
resolution: Updated wireless driver; disabled band steering.

summary: User account locked after failed logins
resolution: Unlocked account and forced password reset.

summary: MFA authenticator not accepting codes
resolution: Re-enrolled authenticator device.

summary: Access denied to shared finance drive
resolution: Added user to the correct security group.

summary: SSO login loops on the HR portal
resolution: Cleared SSO cookies and fixed SAML clock skew.

summary: Self-service password reset blocked for new joiner
resolution: Registered recovery methods; unblocked reset policy.

summary: Outlook stuck, not receiving new mail
resolution: Rebuilt Outlook profile.

summary: Mailbox full, bouncing incoming email
resolution: Enabled archive and raised quota temporarily.

summary: No audio in Teams meetings
resolution: Reset Teams devices and cleared cache.

summary: Laptop will not turn on after update
resolution: Power drain fixed boot; replaced charger.

summary: Shared office printer offline
resolution: Restarted spooler and reinstalled printer port.

summary: External monitor shows no signal through dock
resolution: Updated dock firmware and reseated cable.

summary: Docking station not detecting USB peripherals
resolution: Firmware update in progress.

summary: Request to install approved design software
resolution: Pushed package via deployment tool.

summary: Design suite license activation fails
resolution: Re-assigned license seat and re-ran activation.

summary: Accounting app crashes on launch
resolution: Repaired install and removed corrupt plugin.

summary: App reports database connection refused
resolution: Restarted DB service and fixed firewall rule.

summary: Reporting queries extremely slow at month-end
resolution: Rebuilt indexes and updated statistics.

summary: Frequent deadlocks on the orders table under load
resolution: Aligning transaction order; adding retry logic.

summary: User reported a suspected phishing email
resolution: Quarantined message and purged from other mailboxes.

summary: Suspicious sign-in alert from unknown location
resolution: Forced password reset and revoked sessions.

summary: Employee lost a company phone
resolution: Remote-wiped device and rotated credentials.

summary: OneDrive files stuck pending sync
resolution: Reset sync client and re-linked account.

summary: Access denied to the analytics SaaS app
resolution: Re-provisioned SaaS entitlement and cloud role.

summary: Softphone has no audio on outbound calls
resolution: Selected correct audio device and re-registered SIP.

summary: Branch office VPN tunnel down after power cut
resolution: Re-established site-to-site tunnel and verified routes.
